name: Focal
description: Focal is an AI-powered compliance platform offering sanctions screening, KYC, AML transaction monitoring and fraud prevention APIs tailored for fintechs and banks across MENA and global markets.

seo.title: Focal — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Focal: Focal is an AI-powered compliance platform offering sanctions screening, KYC, AML transaction monitoring and fraud prevention APIs tailored for fintechs

when_to_use: Sanctions screening API for MENA fintech compliance
KYC document verification for Middle East bank onboarding
AML transaction monitoring for regional payment platforms
PEP screening for wealth management client due diligence
Fraud prevention signals for cross-border MENA payments

pros: Tuned for MENA regulations and local data sources
Screening, KYC, monitoring and fraud in one API
AI reduces false positives on Arabic-name screening
Strong fit for Saudi, UAE and Egyptian fintechs
cons: Outside MENA coverage is less differentiated
Brand recognition low with US and EU auditors
Younger platform, fewer public case studies
Pricing opaque, requires direct sales contact
review.verdict: Best-in-region compliance API for MENA fintechs; elsewhere you'd pick a more established global vendor.
review.best_for: MENA fintechs and banks wanting one API for sanctions, KYC, transaction monitoring and fraud
review.not_for: US or EU-only teams where regional players like Alloy or Signicat have deeper local coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
